app.title: Drop&Go
app.tagline: Instant messaging and file sharing without signing in. Create a room — share the code with a friend.
app.footer: Connection is encrypted. No data is stored on the server.

host.shareHint: Show the QR code or share the code with your friend

guest.connectingHint: This can take up to 10 seconds on the first attempt.
guest.ended: Host ended the session. All data has been deleted.
guest.notFound: Room not found or expired. Ask the host to generate a new code.

hostError.roomBusy: This code is already in use. Refresh the page to generate a new one.
hostError.signaling: Couldn't reach the signaling server. Check your internet connection and try again.
